violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. - Boxes of food on floor in walk-in freezer.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. - Gray tote in walk-in cooler containing pre-portioned meat were not separated according to minimum cooking temperatures.--Food removed from original packaging was not placed in a clean and sanitized container. - Gray totes containing pre-portioned meat in need of cleaning/sanitizing. Food/juices dried on bottom.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. - WjObserved wet cloth taken out of dirty sani bucket and set on counter, touching clean wiping cloths.--Cloth or sanitizer solution for wiping food spills was not clean. - Dirty utensil/knife found in sani bucket.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. - Shelves, drawers, below shelves, and floors of all cooling equipment and freezers in need of cleaning.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. - Microwaves in need of cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as needed. - Filters are very dark with grease buildup and in need of cleaning.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. - Dishwasher tested at 0 ppm CHL during inspection. Corrected Onsite. Maintenance came and had it testing at 50 ppm CHL before report was signed.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. - Table with clean plates/bowls sitting uncovered and not inverted.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings (e.g. light fixtures, vent covers, decorations etc..) were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair. - Vent covers throughout kitchen in need of cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors, walls, and ceiling throughout kitchen in need of more thorough cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
